station_address: 1, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
There are some good at well as bad things about this petrol, few staffs are arrogant, and a few are very good . Especially the guys filling air in tires, they cheat you by telling your tier, is puchured.  Moreover, the tire repair cost is way to high as compared to local market .
Today, while I was in the lane for filing petrol. The person before me had some issues. In filing petrol, the staff started the meter from fifty one instead of zero after that the person was having arguments with the staff then, what these guys did was they played music with a very high volume so that the other people waiting in the queue will not be able to hear the argument conversation that the person and the staff was having .

station_address: 1, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Beware they cause financial fraud
They charge more than the bill, if you don't check they charge extra money
For eg. I filled a petrol of Rs 400 n they charged 1000.
After leaving the pump I received the message stating Rs 1000 debited, after I contacted them , they paid the extra amount
But if any one doesn't check,  means they might have a regular practice of cheating the customers

station_address: 1, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Here’s a suggestion for your review. You can copy and paste or tweak it to match your tone:

---

One of the worst petrol pump experiences.
They charged me twice for the same fuel and refused to acknowledge the first payment. Staff was rude and didn’t care about the long queue of customers. It felt like a total scam—no respect for customer’s time or money. Be careful and double-check everything if you’re forced to visit this place. Definitely not recommended.

---

text:
Went to fill petrol asked to do full tank. After filling the petrol for 3160 he took my card and entered 3760. I asked him to give me bill and he went back and winked to the other guy.

They tried to scam me. They always half cover the density and the charges display on the tank.

Careful and always double check

station_address: 1, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Please be aware of scammers. On April 26th at around 6:30 AM, two young men attempted to scam me by claiming that the air pressure in my back tire was low, around 9 PSI. Since I was with my infant in the car, I decided to check the back tire. They removed the tire and pretended to search for a puncture. However, there was no leakage, and one of them marked a spot, saying it was the puncture point, and even attempted to puncture the tire.

I insisted they show me the leak with a solution, but there was no puncture. I realized it was a scam. Please be cautious and avoid getting air or nitrogen filled by similar individuals. They wasted my time and could have easily damaged my tire with their unnecessary actions. Afterward, I drove 120 km and checked the air pressure again at another petrol station; the tire pressure hadn’t dropped at all.

Stay alert to protect yourself from scammers. The photographs included are from my dashcam.

station_address: 1, Swami Vivekanand Rd, Jawahar Nagar, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Petrol overflowed and came all over my pants, and even after that they blame me for not auto cutoff, like your bike doesnot suport auto cutoff.

Staff are really rude. Have to pay 1245/- rupess half of the petrol was on the ground and on my pants.

It was really risky cause my bike was hot, and petrol was spilled on engine too.

I could have died that day if i didnt shut the petrol fuel handle.

Plz avoid this petrol pump.
